name: G-Force USB Link
description: Configure G-Force TS-series brushless ESCs and update the PROGBOX, over the G0017 PROGBOX USB link.

install.exe_relative_path: GFORCE USB Link V2.08/GFORCE USB Link V2.08.exe

notes: Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. The archive holds TWO exes (the main app and USBLINK/GFUsbLink_V2.exe), so exe_relative_path must stay pinned - the single-exe fallback scan cannot disambiguate them. Both the folder and exe names contain spaces. UI ships EN/JP/CN/DE resources; the manuals are Japanese. Requires the PROGBOX (G0017) and a data-capable micro-USB cable. G-Force keeps superseded versions online, so a stale URL degrades to an older build rather than a 404.
